sprints.name: MVP: Dipole + MoM + S11
sprints.description: Core antenna simulation foundation with half-wave dipole, MoM solver, and S11 visualization

tasks.title: Implement half-wave dipole geometry
tasks.description: Create DipoleAntenna struct with length parameter, wire segmentation, and feed point definition
acceptance_criteria: DipoleAntenna generates 21 segments for λ/2 dipole at 300 MHz
Feed point located at center segment
Wire coordinates span -λ/4 to +λ/4 along z-axis

tasks.title: Implement MoM impedance matrix solver
tasks.description: Build Method of Moments solver with impedance matrix fill and LU decomposition for current distribution
acceptance_criteria: Impedance matrix Z[i,j] computed using thin-wire kernel
Current distribution I solved via Z*I = V excitation
Input impedance Z_in = V/I at feed point within 10% of analytical 73+j42.5Ω

tasks.title: Implement S-parameter extraction
tasks.description: Convert input impedance to S11 reflection coefficient and create SParameterResult struct
acceptance_criteria: S11 = (Z_in - 50) / (Z_in + 50) formula implemented
SParameterResult contains frequency, S11_magnitude_dB, S11_phase_deg
Half-wave dipole S11 < -10dB at resonance frequency

tasks.title: Add Tauri simulation command
tasks.description: Create run_simulation Tauri command that takes antenna parameters and returns S-parameter results
acceptance_criteria: run_simulation(antenna_type, frequency, params) returns Vec<SParameterResult>
Command accessible from frontend via invoke()
Error handling for invalid parameters returns proper error messages

tasks.title: Create S11 chart component
tasks.description: Build React component using recharts to display S11 magnitude vs frequency with dB scale
acceptance_criteria: Chart displays frequency range 50-500 MHz on x-axis
S11 magnitude in dB (-40 to 0 dB) on y-axis
Grid lines and axis labels clearly visible
Data points connected with smooth line

tasks.title: Create antenna parameter controls
tasks.description: Build parameter input panel with frequency slider and dipole length control
acceptance_criteria: Frequency slider: 50-500 MHz range with 1 MHz steps
Dipole length input: 0.1-2.0 wavelengths with 0.01 precision
Real-time parameter validation with error messages
Run Simulation button triggers MoM solver

tasks.title: Create dipole 3D visualization
tasks.description: Build DipoleModel component using Three.js to render wire antenna in 3D viewport
acceptance_criteria: Dipole rendered as cylindrical wire with 1mm radius
Wire color indicates current distribution (red=high, blue=low)
Feed point marked with distinct color/geometry
Model scales correctly with length parameter changes

tasks.title: Setup 3D viewport with camera controls
tasks.description: Create main 3D scene with orbit controls, lighting, and coordinate axes
acceptance_criteria: Mouse orbit, zoom, pan controls functional
Coordinate axes (X=red, Y=green, Z=blue) visible
Ambient + directional lighting for proper shading
Viewport resizes correctly with window

tasks.title: Implement Touchstone file import
tasks.description: Add file upload component to import .s1p files and overlay data on S11 chart
acceptance_criteria: File input accepts .s1p/.s2p extensions only
Parser extracts frequency and S11 data from Touchstone format
Imported data overlaid on chart as dashed line with different color
Error handling for malformed files with user feedback

tasks.title: Create main application layout
tasks.description: Build responsive layout with parameter panel, 3D viewport, and results chart
acceptance_criteria: Three-panel layout: controls (left), 3D view (center), chart (right)
Panels resizable with drag handles
Layout responsive on screens 1024px+ width
Professional styling with consistent color scheme

sprints.name: GPU Acceleration + Multi-Antenna Support
sprints.description: Add GPU-accelerated MoM solver and support for QFH and patch antennas

tasks.title: Add QFH antenna geometry
tasks.description: Implement Quadrifilar Helix antenna with 4 helical elements and 90° phase feeding
acceptance_criteria: QFH generates 4 helical wires with configurable turns and pitch
Each element has 90° phase offset (0°, 90°, 180°, 270°)
Circular polarization achieved with proper excitation
Resonance frequency matches design formula within 5%

tasks.title: Add patch antenna geometry
tasks.description: Implement rectangular microstrip patch antenna with ground plane
acceptance_criteria: Patch dimensions calculated from substrate parameters (εr, h, frequency)
Ground plane extends beyond patch by λ/4 minimum
Feed point positioned for 50Ω input impedance
Resonance frequency within 3% of design target

tasks.title: Implement GPU impedance matrix computation
tasks.description: Port MoM impedance matrix fill to GPU compute shaders using wgpu
acceptance_criteria: Compute shader calculates Z[i,j] elements in parallel
GPU results match CPU implementation within 1e-6 tolerance
Performance improvement >5x for matrices larger than 100x100
Memory management handles large matrices without crashes

tasks.title: Add parallel frequency sweep
tasks.description: Implement GPU-accelerated frequency sweep for S-parameter extraction
acceptance_criteria: Parallel computation of S11 across frequency range
Batch processing of 100+ frequency points
Results identical to sequential CPU sweep
Performance scales linearly with GPU compute units

tasks.title: Add antenna type selector
tasks.description: Create dropdown to switch between Dipole, QFH, and Patch antenna types
acceptance_criteria: Dropdown contains Dipole, QFH, Patch options
Parameter panel updates to show relevant controls for selected type
3D viewport switches antenna model automatically
Previous simulation results cleared on type change

tasks.title: Create QFH 3D model
tasks.description: Build QFHModel component to render quadrifilar helix antenna
acceptance_criteria: 4 helical elements rendered as curved tubes
Each element colored differently (red, green, blue, yellow)
Helix pitch and turns adjustable via props
Feed points marked at base of each element

tasks.title: Create patch antenna 3D model
tasks.description: Build PatchModel component to render microstrip patch with ground plane
acceptance_criteria: Rectangular patch rendered as thin metallic surface
Ground plane visible beneath substrate layer
Substrate shown as semi-transparent dielectric
Feed point indicated with probe geometry

tasks.title: Add frequency sweep controls
tasks.description: Create UI controls for frequency range and sweep parameters
acceptance_criteria: Start frequency input: 10 MHz - 10 GHz range
Stop frequency input: must be > start frequency
Number of points: 10-1000 with default 101
Sweep button triggers GPU-accelerated computation

tasks.title: Add Touchstone export functionality
tasks.description: Implement S1P file export for simulation results
acceptance_criteria: export_s1p() converts Vec<SParameterResult> to valid .s1p format
File header includes frequency units and reference impedance
Data format: frequency S11_mag S11_phase (one per line)
Exported files readable by standard RF tools (ADS, CST)

sprints.name: Dataset Generation + Advanced Features
sprints.description: Generate training datasets and add advanced simulation features

tasks.title: Implement batch simulation runner
tasks.description: Create system to run hundreds of MoM simulations with parameter variations
acceptance_criteria: Batch runner accepts parameter ranges (min, max, steps)
Generates all parameter combinations automatically
Saves results to structured dataset format (JSON/HDF5)
Progress tracking and estimated completion time

tasks.title: Setup dataset generation pipeline
tasks.description: Create Python scripts to orchestrate large-scale simulation campaigns
acceptance_criteria: Parameter space sampling (uniform, random, Latin hypercube)
Dataset validation and quality checks
Export to training-ready format (features + targets)
Generate 1000+ dipole simulations with varied length/frequency

tasks.title: Add performance benchmarking
tasks.description: Implement benchmarking system to compare CPU vs GPU performance
acceptance_criteria: run_benchmark() command measures impedance matrix fill time
Tests matrix sizes from 50x50 to 500x500
Returns JSON with CPU time, GPU time, speedup ratio
Benchmark results displayed in UI performance panel

tasks.title: Add advanced results display
tasks.description: Enhance results panel with gain, directivity, and efficiency metrics
acceptance_criteria: Results table shows: frequency, S11, gain (dBi), directivity, efficiency
Metrics calculated from current distribution and radiated power
Export results to CSV functionality
Sortable columns and filtering options

tasks.title: Add Yagi antenna model
tasks.description: Create YagiModel component for 3-element Yagi antenna visualization
acceptance_criteria: 3 elements: reflector (longest), driven element, director (shortest)
Elements rendered as colored cylinders (reflector=red, driven=green, director=blue)
Boom structure connecting elements
Element spacing and lengths configurable via props

tasks.title: Add element labels and wireframe mode
tasks.description: Add text labels for antenna elements and wireframe rendering toggle
acceptance_criteria: Text sprites show element names (Reflector, Driven, Director)
Labels positioned above each element
Wireframe toggle button switches between solid and wireframe rendering
Labels remain readable during camera movement

tasks.title: Implement data augmentation utilities
tasks.description: Create tools for expanding training datasets through augmentation
acceptance_criteria: Gaussian noise injection for S-parameter data
Parameter perturbation within physical bounds
Synthetic data generation using interpolation
Augmentation increases dataset size by 3-5x

tasks.title: Add monopole antenna geometry
tasks.description: Implement quarter-wave monopole antenna over ground plane
acceptance_criteria: Monopole length = λ/4 at design frequency
Ground plane modeled as perfect electric conductor
Input impedance approximately 36.5Ω (half of dipole)
Image theory implementation for ground plane effects

sprints.name: AI Surrogate Models + Optimization
sprints.description: Train neural network surrogate models and implement AI-driven optimization

tasks.title: Train neural network surrogate models
tasks.description: Develop PyTorch models to predict S-parameters from antenna geometry
acceptance_criteria: Neural network trained on 1000+ simulation dataset
Model predicts S11 vs frequency with <5% error
Training/validation/test split: 70/15/15
Model converges within 100 epochs

tasks.title: Implement model evaluation metrics
tasks.description: Add comprehensive evaluation metrics for surrogate model performance
acceptance_criteria: MSE, MAE, R-squared metrics calculated
Per-frequency error analysis
Model performance visualization plots
Automated model validation pipeline

tasks.title: Export models to ONNX format
tasks.description: Convert trained PyTorch models to ONNX for cross-platform inference
acceptance_criteria: ONNX export preserves model accuracy
Exported models loadable in Rust via ort crate
Inference speed >100x faster than MoM simulation
Model file size <50MB for deployment

tasks.title: Integrate ONNX inference engine
tasks.description: Add ONNX runtime to Rust backend for fast surrogate model inference
acceptance_criteria: Load ONNX models at application startup
predict_s_parameters() command using AI inference
Results match Python model predictions exactly
Inference completes in <100ms for single prediction

tasks.title: Implement genetic algorithm optimizer
tasks.description: Add GA-based optimization to find optimal antenna parameters
acceptance_criteria: GA optimizes for target S11 < -20dB at specific frequency
Population size 50, mutation rate 0.1, crossover rate 0.8
Converges to optimal solution within 100 generations
Uses AI surrogate for fitness evaluation (not MoM)

tasks.title: Add AI prediction mode toggle
tasks.description: Create UI toggle to switch between MoM simulation and AI prediction
acceptance_criteria: Toggle button: 'MoM Simulation' vs 'AI Prediction'
AI mode shows prediction confidence/uncertainty
Speed comparison displayed (AI: <1s, MoM: 10-60s)
Warning when parameters outside training range

tasks.title: Create optimization interface
tasks.description: Build UI for setting optimization targets and running GA optimizer
acceptance_criteria: Target frequency input and S11 goal setting
Parameter bounds specification (min/max values)
Start optimization button with progress tracking
Results display shows optimal parameters and achieved performance

tasks.title: Add optimization visualization
tasks.description: Visualize optimization progress in 3D viewport
acceptance_criteria: Antenna geometry updates in real-time during optimization
Color coding shows parameter evolution (red=poor, green=good)
Optimization history trail showing parameter changes
Final optimal design highlighted with special rendering

sprints.name: Reporting + Project Management + Polish
sprints.description: Add professional reporting, project save/load, and final polish

tasks.title: Implement project save/load system
tasks.description: Add functionality to save and load complete antenna design projects
acceptance_criteria: Project file contains antenna parameters, simulation results, optimization history
JSON format with schema validation
Save/load preserves all UI state and 3D viewport settings
Backward compatibility with older project versions

tasks.title: Create professional report generator
tasks.description: Build comprehensive PDF report generation for antenna designs
acceptance_criteria: Report includes: antenna geometry, S-parameters, 3D renderings, optimization results
Professional formatting with company branding
Export to PDF with embedded charts and images
Customizable report templates

tasks.title: Add project management interface
tasks.description: Create project browser and management tools
acceptance_criteria: Recent projects list with thumbnails
Project search and filtering capabilities
Import/export project functionality
Project templates for common antenna types

tasks.title: Add advanced visualization features
tasks.description: Implement radiation pattern visualization and field overlays
acceptance_criteria: 3D radiation pattern rendering (gain vs theta/phi)
Near-field visualization with color-coded intensity
Animation controls for field evolution
Multiple view modes: pattern, fields, geometry

tasks.title: Implement advanced charting features
tasks.description: Add Smith chart, polar plots, and multi-parameter visualization
acceptance_criteria: Smith chart for impedance visualization
Polar radiation pattern plots
Multi-trace support for parameter studies
Chart export to PNG/SVG formats

tasks.title: Add comprehensive error handling
tasks.description: Implement robust error handling and user feedback throughout application
acceptance_criteria: All Tauri commands return proper Result<T, Error> types
User-friendly error messages for common failure modes
Graceful degradation when GPU acceleration unavailable
Automatic error reporting and logging system

tasks.title: Optimize GPU memory management
tasks.description: Implement efficient GPU memory allocation and cleanup
acceptance_criteria: Memory pools for frequently allocated buffers
Automatic cleanup of GPU resources
Memory usage monitoring and reporting
Support for systems with limited GPU memory

tasks.title: Add model uncertainty quantification
tasks.description: Implement uncertainty estimation for AI surrogate predictions
acceptance_criteria: Bayesian neural networks or ensemble methods for uncertainty
Confidence intervals displayed with predictions
Out-of-distribution detection for parameter ranges
Uncertainty-aware optimization algorithms

tasks.title: Final UI polish and accessibility
tasks.description: Complete UI refinement with accessibility features and responsive design
acceptance_criteria: WCAG 2.1 AA compliance for accessibility
Keyboard navigation support throughout application
High contrast mode and font scaling options
Responsive design works on tablets and large monitors

shared_interfaces_needed: AntennaGeometry trait for all antenna types (core → ui/3d)
SParameterResult struct for simulation data (core → ui)
GPUCapabilities struct for hardware detection (gpu → ui)
ModelPrediction struct for AI results (aiml → core → ui)
ProjectData struct for save/load functionality (core → ui)
BenchmarkResult struct for performance metrics (gpu → ui)
OptimizationResult struct for GA outcomes (core → ui)
